narrative:
Cols 39-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 496 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 0.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.2 percentage points.
